title: Cold Spicy Sichuan Noodles
author: Hao Ye
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ik4ccyw

steps.title: Prepare pickled cucumbers following linked recipe
steps.instruction: Prepare pickled cucumbers following linked recipe. Brine ingredients: %s %s 1 cup rice vinegar (unseasoned) 1 cup water 3/4 cup sugar 1 tbsp salt Other ingredients: %s %s 6 persian cucumbers (julienned) Notes: We are going to combine these cucumbers with the noodles, so keep that in mind when determining how large the pieces should be. I like to slice the cucumber pieces to 2-2.5 inches long and so that each piece has a bit of peel attached. The brine is sufficient for 6 cucumbers, though you only need 3-4 for each 12 oz of noodles, so the rest can be reserved for later consumption. :) http://www.seriouseats.com/recipes/2013/10/quick-pickled-cucumbers-rice-vinegar-recipe.html These can be prepared ahead of time (i.e. the night before).

steps.title: Cook noodles following package instructions. Ingredients
steps.instruction: Cook noodles following package instructions. Ingredients: %s %s ~ 12 oz. noodles 2 tbsp sesame seed oil 2 bunches green onions (thinly sliced) Which noodles? I like the Sun noodles ramen kits - shoyu or tantanmen flavors have the same noodles with the size and consistency I like, but you can experiment here.

steps.title: Mix ingredients together
steps.instruction: Mix ingredients together: %s %s vinegar: a peppercorn oil: a pickled peppers: a The seasoning can be varied to taste, but note that oil separation will occur; so it is necessary to be sure that the sauce is mixed well before tasting.

steps.title: Mix sauce and noodles well and serve
steps.instruction: Mix sauce and noodles well and serve. Ideally, we want all the components to be adequately chilled - normal fridge temperature is probably a bit too cold, but if serving to guests, maybe let everything rest at room temperature for ~5 minutes before mixing. Separately, noodles and sauce will keep for about a day in the fridge (longer might be ok, but I'm not sure about food safety), so everything could be prepared the night before and mixed right before serving.

steps.title: After cooking, rinse noodles with cold...
steps.instruction: After cooking, rinse noodles with cold water to cool it down.

steps.title: Drain, then mix well with the...
steps.instruction: Drain, then mix well with the pickled cucumbers and sesame seed oil, which will help prevent sticking while cooling in fridge.

steps.title: Top with thinly sliced green onions
steps.instruction: Top with thinly sliced green onions. Cover and chill in fridge while preparing sauce. a
